ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_types" (
  "car_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car type */,
  "car_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the car type (e.g., Fiat 500) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of passengers the car can accommodate */,
  "luggage_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of luggage items the car can carry */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the car type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the car type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier (e.g., Booking.com) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for customer support */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the supplier data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car type (foreign key) */,
  "car_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the car */,
  "door_count" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the car */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the car model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the car model data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_car_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_type_id") REFERENCES car_types ("car_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (foreign key) */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model (foreign key) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier (foreign key) */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date of pickup */,
  "dropoff_date" TEXT /* Date of dropoff */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the booking */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Specific location for pickup within the city */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Specific location for dropoff within the city */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing or mailing address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer for age verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking (foreign key) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier (foreign key) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the offer */,
  "offer_rating" REAL /* Rating of the offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., promotional, loyalty) */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date for the offer validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date for the offer validity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_offers_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_offers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payment method */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the payment method logo */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the payment method data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking (foreign key) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method (foreign key) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "required_points" INTEGER /* Number of points required to reach the next tier */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits offered by the loyalty program */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date for the loyalty program */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date for the loyalty program */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the loyalty program data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (foreign key) */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program (foreign key) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the customer */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Current tier of the customer in the loyalty program */,
  "points_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the points will expire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program was associated with the customer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date for the discount validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date for the discount validity */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum amount required to apply the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_discounts" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking (foreign key) */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount (foreign key) */,
  "applied_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount was applied */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id", "discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking (foreign key) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier (foreign key) */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., revenue, bookings) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the analytics record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
